summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KKTCX adult partner platform. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for homepage, partners page, partner dashboard, profile edit, photos page, and admin panel.

issues: Premium Vitrin section text not visible when no homepage_vitrin profiles exist - shows empty section

critical_code_review_comments: SelectItem components correctly use 'all' value instead of empty string - no crashes observed
Photo blur toggle endpoint exists and is properly authenticated
Homepage vitrin and city vitrin admin toggles work correctly via API
Service types and orientations filters work correctly on partners page
Partner profile edit form correctly shows service_types and orientations checkboxes
seed_data_creation: Admin user and test partner already exist in database. 1 approved profile (Aylin) with service_types and orientations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Homepage premium vitrin section, partner filters (gender, service_type, orientation, city), partner profile edit with service_types/orientations checkboxes, photo blur toggle UI (no photos uploaded to test actual blur), admin profile approval and vitrin toggles. MOCKED: WebSocket chat, Netgsm SMS, Stripe payments.
